---
title: "Regression Review"
crossref:
  lst-title: "🎯 Checkpoint 3."
  lst-labels: alpha a
format: live-html
sidebar: lesson-6
---

```{pyodide}
#| include: false
import warnings
from IPython.display import display, HTML

def show_ripeness_prediction():
    intercept = 2.819
    b_R = 0.019
    b_G = -0.030
    b_B = 0.017

    srcdoc = f"""<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-latest.min.js"></script>
<style>
body {{ font-family: sans-serif; margin: 14px; }}
.row {{ display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; margin-bottom: 10px; }}
label {{ font-size: 15px; font-weight: bold; width: 30px; }}
input[type=number] {{
  font-size: 15px; width: 90px; padding: 5px 8px;
  border: 2px solid #ccc; border-radius: 4px;
}}
#swatch {{
  width: 60px; height: 40px; border-radius: 6px;
  border: 2px solid #888; display: inline-block;
}}
#result {{
  font-size: 18px; color: navy; font-weight: bold; margin-top: 12px;
}}
#equation {{
  font-size: 13px; color: #555; margin-top: 6px;
}}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<p style="margin-bottom:12px;font-size:15px;">
  Enter R, G, and B values (0–255) to predict fruit ripeness using the multiple regression model.
</p>

<div class="row">
  <label style="color:crimson;">R:</label>
  <input type="number" id="inR" value="128" min="0" max="255" step="1" oninput="upd()">
  <label style="color:green;">G:</label>
  <input type="number" id="inG" value="128" min="0" max="255" step="1" oninput="upd()">
  <label style="color:dodgerblue;">B:</label>
  <input type="number" id="inB" value="128" min="0" max="255" step="1" oninput="upd()">
  <span id="swatch"></span>
</div>

<div id="result"></div>
<div id="equation"></div>

<script>
var ic={intercept}, bR={b_R}, bG={b_G}, bB={b_B};
function clamp(v){{ return Math.min(255, Math.max(0, isNaN(v) ? 0 : v)); }}
function upd(){{
  var R=clamp(parseFloat(document.getElementById("inR").value));
  var G=clamp(parseFloat(document.getElementById("inG").value));
  var B=clamp(parseFloat(document.getElementById("inB").value));
  var pred = ic + bR*R + bG*G + bB*B;
  document.getElementById("swatch").style.background =
    "rgb("+Math.round(R)+","+Math.round(G)+","+Math.round(B)+")";
  document.getElementById("result").textContent =
    "Predicted Ripeness: " + pred.toFixed(3);
  document.getElementById("equation").textContent =
    "= " + ic + " + " + bR + " \u00d7 " + R.toFixed(0) +
    " + (" + bG + ") \u00d7 " + G.toFixed(0) +
    " + " + bB + " \u00d7 " + B.toFixed(0);
}}
upd();
</script>
</body>
</html>"""

    with warnings.catch_warnings():
        warnings.simplefilter("ignore", UserWarning)
        display(HTML(
            '<iframe srcdoc="{}" width="100%" height="260" '
            'frameborder="0" style="border:none;"></iframe>'.format(
                srcdoc.replace('"', '&quot;')
            )
        ))
```

```{pyodide}
show_ripeness_prediction()
```
